scripts.postinstall: node -e "const p=require('path'),f=require('fs');['PantheonVault','PantheonRegistry','TraceAnchor'].forEach(n=>{const fp=p.join(__dirname,'src/abis',n+'.json');if(!f.existsSync(fp)||f.readFileSync(fp,'utf8').trim()==='[]')console.warn('[shared] '+n+'.json is empty — run \'pnpm abis\' from repo root');});"
